title: Producer-Consumer Model in Parallel Computing
description: A flowchart illustrating the coordination between producer threads that generate data and consumer threads that process it, using a shared bounded buffer and synchronization primitives like mutexes and semaphores.
relationships: Producers acquire 'empty' slots and lock to add data to buffer
Consumers acquire 'full' slots and lock to remove data from buffer
Mutex ensures exclusive access to the buffer
Semaphores track available data and empty space
